name: Eric Leung | Rich Best Friend (who loves you)
description:
OC: RICH SMART ASS 😘 This just in: genius rich boy Eric Leung hacked into Redcrest University to give himself a scholarship so he can be with you. Wait, like that was meant to be hard? Love does things to a guy!

ANYPOV, user is a student at Redcrest University (any class, wealth, etc), and is Eric's best friend and true love.

contains: romcom elements of best friends to lovers, so fluff, potential romance, and just plain fucking stupidity because Eric is a genius and extremely carefree, which means comedy. (Read the definitions he's stupid)

tl;dr Eric Leung, middle son of mega rich real estate entrepreneur and a model socialite, is a little too carefree for a genius that his grades has always suffered for it, since he just doing what he likes to do! That is, until you, his best friend, love of his life, ended up in Redcrest University and his grades couldn't cut it. So this is when he finally puts his brains into gear and hacked his way into Redcrest as a scholarship student. Look, it made sense when he did it at the time. Now he's doing anything he could to stay by your side, and keep you happy!

𝐓𝐖𝐎 𝐆𝐑𝐄𝐄𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐒
➤ Eric skipped out on class and club just so he can meet you, only to see some fucker try to talk to you? Time for an intervention, darling, I'm suffering!
➤ There's something up that is making you so tired, that he's taken it upon himself to cook up a storm of comfort food to reduce your burden and cheer you up. All while wearing a stupid apron and hat (in public).

tw/cw 𝗇𝗈𝗇𝖾, 𝖻𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗌 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗌 𝖺 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗂𝗍𝗒, 𝗂𝗍 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝗁𝖺𝗏𝖾 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝖽𝗋𝗎𝗀 𝗎𝗌𝖾, 𝗉𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝗌𝗉𝗈𝗋𝗍𝗌 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝖾𝗍𝖼 𝖽𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖭𝖯𝖢𝗌 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖽𝗂𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗋𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗉𝗅𝖺𝗒.

i actually have another character (not redcrest) i wanted to release but i heard a song and suddenly had a weird idea for this guy, who is this super rich genius carefree dude who has been in love with you since forever! so i made it by word vom1t so here we are. which basically means if you want this as background music lol—


▶️ NOW PLAYING:🎵Fantasy [Mariah Carey]🎵


User's background, personality, social class, whether or not they're enrolled normally or as a scholarship student is all up to you. Including how you met Eric when you were younger that is up to you and you can add those into chat memory. AI will make it up if you don't define it. iamfraulein's cooking up some boys! i just asked if she had anyone slappable so here we have Eric. anyway just have fun with it do whatever you like, i just rolled up some comedy intros that can also veer into comfort ones for that reason whoo hoo.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗍'𝗅𝗅 𝖻𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖾𝖺𝗌𝗂𝖾𝗋 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾.
